title: evoista caroliniana
intro: Evoista caroliniana, also known as American Bugleweed, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its small, blue-purple flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating anxiety, insomnia, and hyperthyroidism due to its high concentration of alkaloids, including usnic acid and bugleweed glycosides. The health benefits of Evoista caroliniana include its ability to regulate thyroid function, calm the nervous system, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Evoista caroliniana include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support thyroid health and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
